titleInfo.title: Building a Sacred Mountain. The Buddhist Architecture of China’s Mount Wutai

mods.abstract: This is much more than a monograph on Moun Wutai. The author disusses comprehensively all Buddhist sites under the Northern Qi dynasty, also shortly the Shandong stone carvings. That was shortly before our first volume on Shandong 1 appeared. The Dongzhang stone lantern (dated 713-739): 112-114, 128. Appendix 2, Transcription and Translation of the Inscription on the Dongzhang Stone Lantern, 207-209. 五臺山及燈臺記. [This is a "bright-light lantern" (deng guangming tai yisuo 燈光明臺一所).]
